description_long: This hand dryer features a robust, glossy black exterior with a cylindrical protrusion extending from a thick, rectangular backplate. The main body is composed of a smooth, rounded cylinder that likely houses the air-blowing mechanism, seamlessly merging into the square mounting base. The surface is highly reflective, suggesting a polished plastic or coated metal finish. The air outlet is positioned at the end of the cylindrical section, facing downward, and is likely circular in shape. There are no visible buttons or controls, indicating a possible automatic sensor activation. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, suitable for high-traffic urban restrooms or public facilities.
description: A sleek, glossy black hand dryer with a cylindrical air outlet extending from a square backplate, featuring a modern, minimalistic design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the circular end of the cylindrical air outlet centered on a square backplate.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the cylindrical body projecting perpendicularly from the square base, highlighting the smooth transition between the two shapes.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the flat, square backplate with only the tip of the cylindrical outlet visible at the top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the cylindrical extension and the thickness of the backplate.
